name: The Fixer
tagline: Colors don't matter. Only the deal.

mythic_signature.description: Immune to affiliation penalties. Rival affiliations don't drain buffer or trigger discard when The Fixer is in play. Loyal bonuses still apply to other toughs on the turf; The Fixer simply doesn't care.
mythic_signature.balance_note: Balanced stats. The value is stacking flexibility — The Fixer lets you run a rainbow turf without buffer economy. Opens whole archetype compositions that were previously walled off by affiliation conflict.
